skill.name: turkce-asistan
skill.description: Türkçe metin yazımı, düzeltme ve üslup yardımı. Resmi/gayriresmi ton ayarı, sen/siz seçimi, Türkçe dilbilgisi kontrolü ve doğal Türkçe ifadeler için kullan. Türkçe yazarken, Türkçe metin düzeltirken veya Türkçe içerik üretirken aktive et.
skill.summary: Türkçe metin üretimi, dilbilgisi düzeltme ve üslup optimizasyonu için kapsamlı asistan.
skill.author: cesareth

security_audit.summary: Static analysis produced false positives from markdown formatting in documentation. The 'backtick execution' patterns are email template code blocks in SKILL.md, not actual shell commands. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' detections are text content in language guidance, not crypto operations. This is a documentation-only skill for Turkish language assistance with no executable code, no network access, and no dangerous patterns. Safe to publish.

content.user_title: Improve Your Turkish Writing and Communication
content.value_statement: Struggling with Turkish grammar, tone, or formal writing? This skill provides comprehensive Turkish language assistance with grammar correction, tone adjustment, and culturally appropriate expressions for any context.
actual_capabilities: Correct Turkish grammar and spelling errors
Adjust tone between formal, semi-formal, and informal registers
Apply proper sen/siz (you) distinction based on context
Replace foreign loanwords with appropriate Turkish equivalents
Generate Turkish email templates for business and formal contexts
Provide Turkish punctuation and sentence structure guidance
limitations: Does not provide certified legal or official document translation
Cannot verify historical or cultural claims requiring expert knowledge
Regional dialect variations (beyond standard Turkish) may not be fully supported
Does not replace professional translation services for critical documents

use_cases.title: Business Professional Writing Emails
use_cases.description: Draft professional Turkish emails with appropriate formal language, correct honorifics, and culturally suitable closing formulas for business partners, clients, or government offices.
use_cases.target_user: Business professionals working with Turkish counterparts

use_cases.title: Academic Turkish Writing Support
use_cases.description: Write academic papers and reports in Turkish with proper passive voice construction, citation formats, and formal academic style following Turkish academic conventions.
use_cases.target_user: Researchers and students writing in Turkish

use_cases.title: Turkish Language Learning and Practice
use_cases.description: Learn correct Turkish grammar patterns, understand de/da and ki usage, and practice writing with instant feedback on common mistakes and foreign word replacements.
use_cases.target_user: Turkish language learners at intermediate level

prompt_templates.title: Basic Turkish Grammar Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Duzelttigim bu Turkce metni dilbilgisi ve imla acisindan kontrol et, hatalari goster ve duzeltilmis halini yaz: [metnini buraya yapistir]
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick grammar and spelling check for any Turkish text

prompt_templates.title: Formal Email Composition
prompt_templates.prompt: Resmi bir e-posta yazmam gerekiyor. Konu: [konu belirt]. Alici: [alici tanimi]. Amac: [istek veya mesajini acikla]. Turkce resmi yazisma kurallarina uygun bir e-posta taslagi olustur.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating formal business or official correspondence

prompt_templates.title: Tone Adjustment for Audience
prompt_templates.prompt: Bu metni [resmi/yari resmi/gayriresmi] tona cevir ve hedef kitleyi [musteri/yonetici/arkadas] olarak dusunerek yeniden yaz: [metnini yapistir]. Sen/siz kullanimina dikkat et.
prompt_templates.scenario: Adapting existing content for different audiences

prompt_templates.title: Foreign Word Replacement
prompt_templates.prompt: Asagidaki metindeki yabanci kelimeleri Turkce karsiliklariyla degistir ve metni dogal Turkce akisina sahip olacak sekilde yeniden yaz: [metnini yapistir]
prompt_templates.scenario: Purifying Turkish text of unnecessary foreign loanwords

output_examples.input: User needs to write a formal request email to a government office asking for document information
output: Saygili ve resmi bir e-posta taslagi olusturulur
Konu satiri, hitap, aciklama, istek ve kapanis bolumleri icerir
Resmi hitap ve kapanis kalilari dogru sekilde kullanilir

output_examples.input: User submits text with grammar errors: 'Ben de toplantida degildim ama arkadasim ordaydi'
output: Duzeltilmis metin: 'Ben toplantida degildim ama arkadasim oradaydi'

best_practices: Always specify your target audience and desired tone before generating content
Review suggested foreign word replacements to ensure they fit your specific context
Use the sen/siz distinction consistently throughout your document once chosen
anti_patterns: Mixing formal and informal tone within the same document
Inconsistent use of sen/siz forms when addressing the same person
Direct word-for-word translation from English without considering Turkish idiom and structure

faq.question: Bu beceri hangi Turkce yazisma turlerini destekler?
faq.answer: Resmi yazisma (dilekce, kurum yazismasi), is e-postalari, akademik metinler, blog yazilari ve sosyal medya icerikleri dahil tum yaygin Turkce yazisma turlerini destekler.

faq.question: Sen ve siz ayrimini nasil yapiyor?
faq.answer: Baglam analizi yaparak otomatik olarak uygun tonu belirler. Resmi durumlarda her zaman 'siz', gayriresmi durumlarda 'sen' kullanir. Belirsiz durumlarda 'siz' ile baslar.

faq.question: Yabanci kelimeleri nasil degistiriyor?
faq.answer: Meeting, deadline, feedback gibi yaygin is dunyasi kelimelerini Turkce karsiliklariyla (toplanti, son tarih, geri bildirim) degistirir ve metnin dogal akisini korur.

faq.question: Akademik yazimda ozel bir format kullaniyor mu?
faq.answer: Evet, akademik yazida edilgen yapiyi ('yapilmistir', 'incelenmistir') tercih eder ve kisisel zamir kullanmaktan kacinir. APA veya APA7 Turkce uyarlamasina uygun kaynak gosterimi yapar.

faq.question: Bolge agizlarini veya Osmanlica kelimeleri destekliyor mu?
faq.answer: Hayir, bu beceri modern standart Istanbul Turkcesi uzerine odaklanmistir. Bolge agizlari veya Osmanlica kelimeler icin uzman ceviri hizmetleri onerilir.

faq.question: Resmi bir belgeyi ceviri yapabilir mi?
faq.answer: Guncel yasal veya resmi belgelerin sertifikali cevirisini yapmaz. Bu tur belgeler icin yeminli tercuman hizmetleri kullanilmasi gerekir. Genel metin ceviri ve duzeltme icin kullanilabilir.
